[Source: Privileged Account Approval Email.pdf]
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
EVD-102  Approval Email
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Privileged Account Approval Email
PDF export of the approval artifact referenced as missing evidence during the audit.
Document ID
EVD-102
Format
Email export to PDF
Export Date
2024-03-16
Related Evidence
EV-002
Classification
Internal Use
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Email Header
From
Priya Nair <priya.nair@meridian.example>
To
northwind-ops@northwind.example; alex.rivera@meridian.example
CC
maria.santos@meridian.example; grc-archive@meridian.example
Date
2024-01-22 08:42 PST
Subject
Approval — standing privileged access for Northwind support accounts
Hi team,
Approved for the two named Northwind production-support administrators to retain standing privileged access during the
pilot period, provided that:
●
access remains scoped to ticketed support and break-fix tasks only;
all privileged activity continues to feed the Meridian logging pipeline;
the accounts are r

[Source: Privileged Account Approval Email.pdf]
d activity continues to feed the Meridian logging pipeline;
●
the accounts are reviewed again at the next quarterly access recertification;
the vendor confirms the named personnel list before each quarter begins.
Please archive this approval with the Q1 access-review evidence pack. If either named administrator changes, this approval
must be revalidated before access is retained.
Thanks,
Priya
Quoted Thread Excerpt
From: Alex Rivera <alex.rivera@meridian.example>
Sent: 2024-01-21 17:06 PST
Subject: Need owner approval for standing vendor admin accounts before onboarding completes
Requesting approval for two named Northwind support administrators to maintain standing access during
the pilot to meet the contracted response targets.
